All 5 levels must be completed: Complete all 5 levels with the highest score to win the biggest amount of gold bars ever given!

1st - 50 Gold Bars per month for 12 months
2nd - 5th - 50 Gold Bars per month for 3 months
6th - 10th - 50 Gold Bars
Everyone who reached Golden Final - 1x Rainbow Rush, 1x Magic Beam, 1x Shooting Star

For the Qualifier round, players will be put into groups of 50 players. The top 10 players in each group who collect the most stars will win in-game rewards (either Stereo Bolt, Sparkling Blast, Shooting Star) and a place in the next tournament round – Round 1. 

For Round 1, players will be put into groups of 20 players.The top 3 players in each group who collects the most stars will win in-game rewards (either Shooting Star, Sparkling Blast, Magic Beam, Star Dust) and a place in the next tournament round – Round 2.
 
For Round 2, players will be put into groups of 10. The top 1 player in each group who collects the most stars will win in-game rewards (either Gold Bars, Shooting Star, Sparkling Blast, Stereo Bolt, Magic Beam, Star Dust) and a place in the next tournament round – the Golden Final. 

For the Golden Final - Players who reach the final will have 1 attempt at each of the final 5 bubble shooter levels. The top 1 player who completes all 5 levels of bubble shooter with the highest ranked score will be the overall winner and be rewarded with the biggest prize - the most amount of Gold Bars and be crowned the Bubble Witch 3 Saga Golden Tournament Champion. Those who fall into the top 10 highest ranked scores (excluding the overall winner) will also receive Gold Bars. Those who reach the Golden Final but do not win, will also receive some in-game rewards (Rainbow Rush, Magic Beam and Shooting Star).

Congratulations on reaching the Golden Final of Bubble Witch 3 Saga Golden Tournament.
Can you become the Bubble Witch Champion of the World and best Bubble Witch player ever?!

Golden Final
The Golden Final Round is the ultimate test of skill: Complete all 5 levels with the highest score to win the biggest reward of Gold Bars ever!

- All 5 levels must be completed within the allocated time
- 1 attempt per level only
- Each Level has a Countdown Timer of 60 seconds
- Each level has a maximum of 20 Moves
- There are no boosters or blockers
- The Golden Final Round must have a working internet connection
- Winners will be notified if they have won approximately 2 days after the Golden Final has ended

Good Luck!

Collect the most stars in your group to get a spot in the next round.
Qualifier Round: The top 10 star collectors in each group will enter Round 1.
Round 1: The top 3 star collectors in each group will enter Round 2.
Round 2: The top 1 star collector in each group will enter the Golden Final round which will be hosted on a webpage. 
Golden Final: Will take place on a webpage. Players will take part in a 5 level bubble shooting. The #1 player with the highest ranked score will be the overall winner of the Tournament and win the biggest gold bar prize.
To install this webapp on your mobile phone, tap [icon] then 'Add to Home Screen'
Player name must be at least 3 characters long
Player name must only be one word
Player name cannot include special characters
Use a nickname or first name only!
Pop as many bubbles as possible!

For the Golden Final - The player who completes all 5 levels of bubble shooter with the highest ranked score will be the overall winner and be rewarded with the biggest prize - 600 Gold Bars (50/month for a year) and be crowned the Bubble Witch 3 Saga Golden Tournament Champion and best BW3S Player ever!
 
Be aware of:
For Round 1, each group must have 20 people and for Round 2, each group must have 10 people before the participants can start playing. In order to be assigned to a group, you need to be quick! You must enter the game as soon as possible once the event has started to get the best chance of being assigned. 

For Qualifier Round, Round 1 and Round 2, you can play offline, but your points will not increase. Once you get online again, any stars that have been collected while offline will get synced. It is recommended that you play online where possible so that your points can sync in the applicable timeframe per round. If your points sync outside of the schedule/timeframe per round, they will not count and you may not qualify for the next round. 

For the Golden Final Round, you must play online as this will be hosted on a webpage.
Those who make it to the top 10 but do not progress to the next stage will also win some in-game rewards.

Collect the most stars in your group to get a spot in the next round.
 
Qualifier Round: the top 10 star collectors in each group will enter the semi-final.
 
Semi-final: the top 10 star collectors in each group will enter the big final.
 
Big final: the #1 star collector of each group will win the exclusive prize - help design a new Bubble Witch 3 character!

For the qualifier round, players will be put into groups of 50 players. The top 10 players in each group will win in-game rewards (either Spells or Star Dust) and a place in the next tournament round – the Semi-Final.
 
For the Semi-Final, players will be put into groups of 20 players. The top 10 players of each group will enter the Big Final.
 
For the Big Final, players will be put into groups of 20. The player that collects the most stars in each group will be the winner of that group and will receive the prize – the chance to design a character that will be featured in the game Bubble Witch 3 Saga. There will be multiple winners of the “design your character” prize.
 
For the Semi-final and Big Final rounds, each group must have 20 people before the participants can start playing. In order to be assigned to a group, you need to be quick! You must enter the game as soon as possible once the event has started to get the best chance of being assigned. If you miss out on being assigned into a group on any of the rounds, you will receive some in-game rewards (either Spells or Star Dust).
